title: LBPW200IW 200 Pin Wire Timer Lights - Ice White
features: Wired lights bendable to fit any shape
description: Product Description Decorate using these elegantly wired lights bendable to fit any shape and battery operated to decorate indoors or outdoors without extra wiring low energy LEDs, 10 cm between bulbs, overall length is 20.2 m, 6 hours on 18 hours off. Multi Action : 1. Combinations 2. Steady on 3. In wave 4. Twin-light chasing 5.In wave or twinkle flashing 6.Slo-Glo 7. Stepping on 8. Slow-fade. Box Contains 1 x 200 Ice White Pin Wire Timer Lights
